identity.name: Skill Polish Loop
identity.description: Improve an existing Agent Skill through bounded evidence-driven repairs.

purpose.outcome: make the target Skill satisfy its approved behavior contract and validation gates

use_when: an existing Agent Skill needs iterative improvement based on fresh validation evidence
do_not_use_when: the request is a single deterministic edit

cycle.observe: Read the current Skill and the latest validation evidence.
cycle.record: Record the repair, evidence, and remaining failures.
cycle.adapt: Use the new evidence to select the next action or stop.

terminal_states.blocked: Required evidence or capability is unavailable.
terminal_states.stagnated: Fresh evidence no longer changes the next action.
